message.content:
在 D:/llapk/app/src/main/java/com/multilanglearner/data/network/VideoDownloadService.kt 文件中添加 API 健康检查机制。

要求：
1. 创建一个 `ApiHealthChecker` 单例类或对象，用于检测各平台 API 的可用性
2. 实现以下功能：
   - 缓存 API 可用状态（5分钟有效期）
   - 异步检测 API 响应时间和可用性
   - 根据响应时间排序，优先使用最快的 API
3. 在 VideoDownloadService 中集成健康检查：
   - 解析前先检查 API 可用性
   - 跳过已知不可用的 API
   - 定期更新 API 状态

示例代码结构：
```kotlin
object ApiHealthChecker {
    private val apiStatus = mutableMapOf<String, ApiStatus>()
    private val cacheDuration = 5 * 60 * 1000L // 5分钟
    
    data class ApiStatus(
        val isAvailable: Boolean,
        val responseTime: Long,
        val lastCheck: Long
    )
    
    suspend fun checkApiHealth(url: String): ApiStatus
    fun getBestApi(apis: List<String>): String?
    fun invalidateCache()
}
```

只添加必要的代码，不要删除现有功能。

content.text: 我来阅读现有的 VideoDownloadService.kt 文件，然后添加 API 健康检查机制。

content.content:
1→package com.multilanglearner.data.network
     2→
     3→import android.util.Log
     4→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
     5→import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
     6→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
     7→import kotlinx.coroutines.withTimeout
     8→import okhttp3.MediaType.Companion.toMediaType
     9→import okhttp3.OkHttpClient
    10→import okhttp3.Request
    11→import okhttp3.RequestBody.Companion.toRequestBody
    12→import org.json.JSONObject
    13→import java.io.IOException
    14→import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
    15→
    16→/**
    17→ * 视频下载服务 - 使用在线 API 解析视频
    18→ * 支持多平台：B站、抖音、YouTube、TikTok 等
    19→ *
    20→ * 改进点：
    21→ * - 参考 Electron 版本的平台检测和视频提取逻辑
    22→ * - 改进 B站、抖音的解析逻辑，支持多种备用 API
    23→ * - 添加 YouTube 支持（使用 yt-dlp API 或备用方案）
    24→ * - 改进错误处理和重试机制
    25→ * - 添加详细的日志输出
    26→ * - 支持Cookie认证（解决403问题）
    27→ */
    28→class VideoDownloadService(
    29→    private val bilibiliCookieProvider: (() -> String?)? = null,
    30→    private val youtubeCookieProvider: (() -> String?)? = null,
    31→    private val douyinCookieProvider: (() -> String?)? = null,
    32→    private val tiktokCookieProvider: (() -> String?)? = null
    33→) {
    34→
    35→    companion object {
    36→        private const val TAG = "VideoDownloadService"
    37→        private const val DEFAULT_TIMEOUT = 30_000L
    38→        private const val MAX_RETRIES = 3
    39→        private const val RETRY_DELAY_MS = 1000L
    40→    }
    41→
    42→    /**
    43→     * 获取平台对应的Cookie
    44→     */
    45→    private fun getCookieForPlatform(url: String): String? {
    46→        return when {
    47→            url.contains("bilibili.com") || url.contains("b23.tv") -> bilibiliCookieProvider?.invoke()
    48→            url.contains("youtube.com") || url.contains("youtu.be") -> youtubeCookieProvider?.invoke()
    49→            url.contains("douyin.com") || url.contains("iesdouyin.com") -> douyinCookieProvider?.invoke()
    50→            url.contains("tiktok.com") -> tiktokCookieProvider?.invoke()
    51→            else -> null
    52→        }
    53→    }
    54→
    55→    /**
    56→     * 检查指定URL是否需要Cookie认证
    57→     */
    58→    fun isCookieRequired(url: String): Boolean {
    59→        return when {
    60→            url.contains("bilibili.com") || url.contains("b23.tv") -> bilibiliCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    61→            url.contains("youtube.com") || url.contains("youtu.be") -> youtubeCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    62→            url.contains("douyin.com") || url.contains("iesdouyin.com") -> douyinCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    63→            url.contains("tiktok.com") -> tiktokCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    64→            else -> false
    65→        }
    66→    }
    67→
    68→    /**
    69→     * 检查是否已配置B站Cookie
    70→     */
    71→    fun hasBilibiliCookie(): Boolean {
    72→        return bilibiliCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    73→    }
    74→
    75→    /**
    76→     * 检查是否已配置YouTube Cookie
    77→     */
    78→    fun hasYouTubeCookie(): Boolean {
    79→        return youtubeCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    80→    }
    81→
    82→    /**
    83→     * 检查是否已配置抖音 Cookie
    84→     */
    85→    fun hasDouyinCookie(): Boolean {
    86→        return douyinCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    87→    }
    88→
    89→    /**
    90→     * 检查是否已配置TikTok Cookie
    91→     */
    92→    fun hasTiktokCookie(): Boolean {
    93→        return tiktokCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    94→    }
    95→
    96→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    97→        .connectTimeout(30, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    98→        .readTimeout(30, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    99→        .followRedirects(true)
   100→        .build()
   101→
   102→    /**
   103→     * 平台检测 - 参考 Electron 版本的 detectPlatform 函数
   104→     * 支持更多平台和短链接
   105→     */
   106→    fun detectPlatform(url: String): VideoPlatform {
   107→        val lowerUrl = url.lowercase()
   108→        return when {
   109→            // YouTube - 支持主域名和短链接
   110→            lowerUrl.contains("youtube.com") || lowerUrl.contains("youtu.be") -> VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE
   111→            // Bilibili - 支持主域名和 b23.tv 短链接
   112→            lowerUrl.contains("bilibili.com") || lowerUrl.contains("b23.tv") -> VideoPlatform.BILIBILI
   113→            // 抖音 - 支持多种域名
   114→            lowerUrl.contains("douyin.com") || lowerUrl.contains("iesdouyin.com") -> VideoPlatform.DOUYIN
   115→            // TikTok
   116→            lowerUrl.contains("tiktok.com") -> VideoPlatform.TIKTOK
   117→            // 微博
   118→            lowerUrl.contains("weibo.com") -> VideoPlatform.WEIBO
   119→            // 小红书
   120→            lowerUrl.contains("xiaohongshu.com") || lowerUrl.contains("xhslink.com") -> VideoPlatform.XIAOHONGSHU
   121→            // 直接视频链接
   122→            lowerUrl.contains(".mp4") || lowerUrl.contains(".m3u8") || lowerUrl.contains(".mpd") -> VideoPlatform.DIRECT
   123→            // 未知平台
   124→            else -> VideoPlatform.UNKNOWN
   125→        }
   126→    }
   127→
   128→    /**
   129→     * 获取视频下载链接 - 主入口函数
   130→     * 参考 Electron 版本的 extract-info IPC 处理
   131→     */
   132→    suspend fun getVideoInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   133→        withTimeout(DEFAULT_TIMEOUT) {
   134→            try {
   135→                val cleanUrl = cleanUrl(url)
   136→                Log.d(TAG, "Processing URL: $cleanUrl")
   137→
   138→                val platform = detectPlatform(cleanUrl)
   139→                Log.d(TAG, "Detected platform: $platform")
   140→
   141→                when (platform) {
   142→                    VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE -> fetchYoutubeInfo(cleanUrl)
   143→                    VideoPlatform.BILIBILI -> fetchBilibiliInfo(cleanUrl)
   144→                    VideoPlatform.DOUYIN -> fetchDouyinInfo(cleanUrl)
   145→                    VideoPlatform.TIKTOK -> fetchTiktokInfo(cleanUrl)
   146→                    VideoPlatform.DIRECT -> Result.success(
   147→                        VideoDownloadInfo(
   148→                            title = "直接视频链接",
   149→                            downloadUrl = cleanUrl,
   150→                            cover = null,
   151→                            duration = 0L,
   152→                            author = null,
   153→                            platform = VideoPlatform.DIRECT
   154→                        )
   155→                    )
   156→                    else -> Result.failure(
   157→                        Exception(
   158→                            "❌ 不支持的平台\n\n当前链接: $cleanUrl\n\n支持的平台:\n• YouTube (youtube.com, youtu.be)\n• B站 (bilibili.com, b23.tv)\n• 抖音 (douyin.com)\n• TikTok (tiktok.com)\n\n建议: 请使用「导入本地视频」功能"
   159→                        )
   160→                    )
   161→                }
   162→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   163→                Log.e(TAG, "Error fetching video info", e)
   164→                Result.failure(e)
   165→            }
   166→        }
   167→    }
   168→
   169→    /**
   170→     * 清理 URL - 移除多余空格和无效字符
   171→     * 参考 Electron 版本的 cleanUrl 函数
   172→     */
   173→    private fun cleanUrl(url: String): String {
   174→        val trimmed = url.trim()
   175→        // 提取第一个有效的 HTTP/HTTPS 链接
   176→        val match = Regex("(https?://[^\\s\"'<>]+)").find(trimmed)
   177→        return match?.value ?: trimmed
   178→    }
   179→
   180→    /**
   181→     * 获取 YouTube 视频信息 - 改进版，使用 InnerTube API
   182→     * 基于 GitHub 研究：
   183→     * - ViMusic: https://github.com/vfsfitvnm/ViMusic (InnerTube 实现)
   184→     * - NewPipeExtractor: https://github.com/TeamNewPipe/NewPipeExtractor
   185→     */
   186→    private suspend fun fetchYoutubeInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
   187→        Log.d(TAG, "Fetching YouTube info for: $url")
   188→
   189→        // 策略1: 尝试 NewPipeExtractor（推荐）
   190→        val newPipeResult = fetchYoutubeNewPipe(url)
   191→        if (newPipeResult.isSuccess) {
   192→            Log.d(TAG, "NewPipeExtractor success")
   193→            return newPipeResult
   194→        }
   195→        Log.w(TAG, "NewPipeExtractor failed: ${newPipeResult.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   196→
   197→        // 策略2: 尝试 InnerTube API（备用）
   198→        val innertubeResult = fetchYouTubeInnerTubeAPI(url)
   199→        if (innertubeResult.isSuccess) {
   200→            Log.d(TAG, "InnerTube API success")
   201→            return innertubeResult
   202→        }
   203→        Log.w(TAG, "InnerTube API failed: ${innertubeResult.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   204→
   205→        // 策略3: 尝试第三方API（最后备用）
   206→        return fetchYouTubeThirdPartyAPI(url)
   207→    }
   208→
   209→    /**
   210→     * 使用 NewPipeExtractor 解析 YouTube 视频
   211→     * 这是专门为 Android 设计的库，不依赖 YouTube API
   212→     */
   213→    private suspend fun fetchYoutubeNewPipe(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   214→        try {
   215→            val videoId = extractYoutubeVideoId(url)
   216→                ?: return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法提取 YouTube 视频 ID"))
   217→
   218→            Log.d(TAG, "Using NewPipeExtractor for YouTube: $videoId")
   219→
   220→            val streamInfo = org.schabi.newpipe.extractor.stream.StreamInfo.getInfo(
   221→                org.schabi.newpipe.extractor.NewPipe.getService(0),
   222→                url
   223→            )
   224→
   225→            // 获取最佳视频流
   226→            val videoStream = streamInfo.videoStreams
   227→                .filter { it.isVideo }
   228→                .maxByOrNull { it.height ?: 0 }
   229→
   230→            // 获取音频流
   231→            val audioStream = streamInfo.audioStreams
   232→                .filter { it.isAudio }
   233→                .maxByOrNull { it.averageBitrate ?: 0 }
   234→
   235→            if (videoStream != null) {
   236→                Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   237→                    title = streamInfo.name ?: "YouTube 视频",
   238→                    downloadUrl = videoStream.url ?: "",
   239→                    cover = streamInfo.thumbnails?.firstOrNull()?.url,
   240→                    duration = streamInfo.duration?.toLong() ?: 0L,
   241→                    author = streamInfo.uploaderName,
   242→                    platform = VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE,
   243→                    audioUrl = audioStream?.url
   244→                ))
   245→            } else {
   246→                Result.failure(Exception("无法获取视频流"))
   247→            }
   248→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   249→            Log.e(TAG, "NewPipeExtractor error", e)
   250→            Result.failure(e)
   251→        }
   252→    }
   253→
   254→    /**
   255→     * 使用 YouTube InnerTube API 解析
   256→     * InnerTube 是 YouTube 的内部 RESTful API
   257→     */
   258→    private suspend fun fetchYouTubeInnerTubeAPI(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   259→        try {
   260→            val videoId = extractYoutubeVideoId(url)
   261→            if (videoId == null) {
   262→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法提取视频ID"))
   263→            }
   264→            Log.d(TAG, "YouTube video ID: $videoId")
   265→
   266→            // InnerTube API 请求
   267→            val requestBody = JSONObject().apply {
   268→                put("context", JSONObject().apply {
   269→                    put("client", JSONObject().apply {
   270→                        put("clientName", "ANDROID")
   271→                        put("clientVersion", "19.29.37")
   272→                    })
   273→                })
   274→                put("videoId", videoId)
   275→            }.toString()
   276→
   277→            val request = Request.Builder()
   278→                .url("https://www.youtube.com/youtubei/v1/player?key=AIzaSyAO_FJ2SlqU8Q4STEHLGCilw_Y9_11qcW8")
   279→                .header("Content-Type", "application/json")
   280→                .header("User-Agent", "com.google.android.youtube/19.29.37")
   281→                .post(requestBody.toRequestBody("application/json".toMediaType()))
   282→                .build()
   283→
   284→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   285→            val body = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   286→            val json = JSONObject(body)
   287→
   288→            val videoDetails = json.optJSONObject("videoDetails")
   289→            val title = videoDetails?.optString("title") ?: "YouTube视频"
   290→            val author = videoDetails?.optString("author") ?: ""
   291→            val lengthSeconds = videoDetails?.optLong("lengthSeconds") ?: 0L
   292→
   293→            val streamingData = json.optJSONObject("streamingData")
   294→            val formats = streamingData?.optJSONArray("formats")
   295→
   296→            if (formats != null && formats.length() > 0) {
   297→                val format = formats.getJSONObject(0)
   298→                val videoUrl = format.optString("url")
   299→                val thumbnails = videoDetails?.optJSONObject("thumbnail")?.optJSONArray("thumbnails")
   300→                val cover = thumbnails?.optJSONObject(0)?.optString("url") ?: ""
   301→
   302→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   303→                    title = title,
   304→                    downloadUrl = videoUrl,
   305→                    cover = cover,
   306→                    duration = lengthSeconds,
   307→                    author = author,
   308→                    platform = VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE
   309→                ))
   310→            }
   311→
   312→            Result.failure(Exception("无法获取视频流"))
   313→
   314→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   315→            Log.e(TAG, "InnerTube API error", e)
   316→            Result.failure(e)
   317→        }
   318→    }
   319→
   320→    /**
   321→     * 使用第三方API解析（备用方案）
   322→     */
   323→    private suspend fun fetchYouTubeThirdPartyAPI(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
   324→        // 尝试多个第三方API
   325→        val apis = listOf(
   326→            YoutubeApiConfig("https://yt.lemnoslife.com/videosPart", "lemnoslife"),
   327→            YoutubeApiConfig("https://noembed.com/embed?url=$url", "noembed")
   328→        )
   329→
   330→        for (api in apis) {
   331→            try {
   332→                Log.d(TAG, "Trying YouTube API: ${api.name}")
   333→                val result = fetchYoutubeInfoWithApi(url, api)
   334→                if (result.isSuccess) {
   335→                    return result
   336→                }
   337→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   338→                Log.w(TAG, "YouTube API ${api.name} failed: ${e.message}")
   339→            }
   340→        }
   341→
   342→        return Result.failure(
   343→            Exception("❌ YouTube 解析失败\n\n建议：请使用「导入本地视频」功能或在电脑上使用 yt-dlp 下载")
   344→        )
   345→    }
   346→
   347→    /**
   348→     * 使用指定 API 获取 YouTube 视频信息
   349→     */
   350→    private suspend fun fetchYoutubeInfoWithApi(
   351→        url: String,
   352→        api: YoutubeApiConfig
   353→    ): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   354→        try {
   355→            when (api.name) {
   356→                "lemnoslife" -> {
   357→                    // 使用 Lemnoslife API
   358→                    val videoId = extractYoutubeVideoId(url)
   359→                        ?: return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法提取 YouTube 视频 ID"))
   360→
   361→                    val request = Request.Builder()
   362→                        .url("${api.endpoint}?id=$videoId")
   363→                        .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   364→                        .build()
   365→
   366→                    val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   367→                    val responseBody = response.body?.string()
   368→                        ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   369→
   370→                    Log.d(TAG, "Lemnoslife API response: ${responseBody.take(200)}")
   371→
   372→                    val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
   373→                    if (!json.has("items") || json.getJSONArray("items").length() == 0) {
   374→                        return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("视频不存在或不可用"))
   375→                    }
   376→
   377→                    val items = json.getJSONArray("items")
   378→                    val video = items.getJSONObject(0)
   379→
   380→                    // 注意：这个 API 主要提供元数据，不提供下载链接
   381→                    // 实际下载需要使用其他方法
   382→                    Result.success(
   383→                        VideoDownloadInfo(
   384→                            title = video.optString("title", "YouTube 视频"),
   385→                            downloadUrl = url, // 返回原 URL，需要特殊处理
   386→                            cover = video.optJSONArray("thumbnails")
   387→                                ?.optJSONObject(0)
   388→                                ?.optString("url"),
   389→                            duration = video.optLong("durationSeconds", 0L),
   390→                            author = video.optJSONArray("channel")
   391→                                ?.optJSONObject(0)
   392→                                ?.optString("name"),
   393→                            platform = VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE
   394→                        )
   395→                    )
   396→                }
   397→                "noembed" -> {
   398→                    // 使用 NoEmbed API（主要用于获取元数据）
   399→                    val request = Request.Builder()
   400→                        .url(api.endpoint)
   401→                        .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   402→                        .build()
   403→
   404→                    val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   405→                    val responseBody = response.body?.string()
   406→                        ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   407→
   408→                    Log.d(TAG, "NoEmbed API response: ${responseBody.take(200)}")
   409→
   410→                    val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
   411→                    val title = json.optString("title", "YouTube 视频")
   412→                    val author = json.optString("author_name")
   413→
   414→                    Result.success(
   415→                        VideoDownloadInfo(
   416→                            title = title,
   417→                            downloadUrl = url, // NoEmbed 不提供下载链接
   418→                            cover = json.optString("thumbnail_url"),
   419→                            duration = 0L,
   420→                            author = author,
   421→                            platform = VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE
   422→                        )
   423→                    )
   424→                }
   425→                else -> Result.failure(Exception("未知 API"))
   426→            }
   427→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   428→            Log.e(TAG, "Error fetching YouTube info with ${api.name}", e)
   429→            Result.failure(e)
   430→        }
   431→    }
   432→
   433→    /**
   434→     * 提取 B站 BV 号
   435→     * 支持 BV 号和 b23.tv 短链接
   436→     */
   437→    private fun extractBVID(url: String): String? {
   438→        val bvPattern = Regex("(BV[a-zA-Z0-9]{10})")
   439→        val match = bvPattern.find(url)
   440→        return match?.groupValues?.get(1)
   441→    }
   442→
   443→    /**
   444→     * 提取 YouTube 视频 ID
   445→     */
   446→    private fun extractYoutubeVideoId(url: String): String? {
   447→        // 支持 youtube.com/watch?v= 和 youtu.be/ 格式
   448→        val patterns = listOf(
   449→            Regex("(?:youtube\\.com/watch\\?v=|youtu\\.be/)([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})"),
   450→            Regex("youtube\\.com/embed/([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})")
   451→        )
   452→
   453→        for (pattern in patterns) {
   454→            val match = pattern.find(url)
   455→            if (match != null) {
   456→                return match.groupValues[1]
   457→            }
   458→        }
   459→        return null
   460→    }
   461→
   462→    /**
   463→     * 获取 B站视频信息 - 改进版，优先使用官方API
   464→     * 基于 GitHub 研究：bilibili-api Kotlin 库实现
   465→     *
   466→     * 策略：
   467→     * 1. 优先使用 B站官方 API
   468→     * 2. 官方API失败后，尝试第三方API作为备用
   469→     */
   470→    private suspend fun fetchBilibiliInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
   471→        Log.d(TAG, "Fetching Bilibili info for: $url")
   472→
   473→        // 策略1: 尝试官方API
   474→        val officialResult = fetchBilibiliOfficialAPI(url)
   475→        if (officialResult.isSuccess) {
   476→            Log.d(TAG, "Official API success")
   477→            return officialResult
   478→        }
   479→        Log.w(TAG, "Official API failed: ${officialResult.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   480→
   481→        // 策略2: 尝试第三方API（备用）
   482→        return fetchBilibiliThirdPartyAPI(url)
   483→    }
   484→
   485→    /**
   486→     * 使用 B站官方 API 解析
   487→     * 参考 bilibili-api (Kotlin): https://github.com/czp3009/bilibili-api
   488→     *
   489→     * API 端点：
   490→     * - 视频信息: https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/view?bvid={bvid}
   491→     * - 播放地址: https://api.bilibili.com/x/player/playurl?bvid={bvid}&cid={cid}
   492→     */
   493→    private suspend fun fetchBilibiliOfficialAPI(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   494→        try {
   495→            // 1. 提取 BV 号
   496→            val bvid = extractBVID(url)
   497→            if (bvid == null) {
   498→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法提取BV号"))
   499→            }
   500→            Log.d(TAG, "BV ID: $bvid")
   501→
   502→            // 获取Cookie（如果有配置）
   503→            val cookie = getCookieForPlatform(url)
   504→            if (cookie != null) {
   505→                Log.d(TAG, "Using configured cookies for Bilibili API")
   506→            }
   507→
   508→            // 2. 获取视频信息（获取 cid）
   509→            val infoUrl = "https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/view?bvid=$bvid"
   510→            val infoRequestBuilder = Request.Builder()
   511→                .url(infoUrl)
   512→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   513→                .header("Referer", "https://www.bilibili.com/")
   514→
   515→            // 添加Cookie
   516→            if (cookie != null) {
   517→                infoRequestBuilder.header("Cookie", cookie)
   518→            }
   519→
   520→            val infoRequest = infoRequestBuilder.build()
   521→
   522→            val infoResponse = client.newCall(infoRequest).execute()
   523→            val infoBody = infoResponse.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   524→            val infoJson = JSONObject(infoBody)
   525→
   526→            if (infoJson.optInt("code", -1) != 0) {
   527→                val errorMsg = infoJson.optString("message")
   528→                // 检查是否是需要Cookie的错误
   529→                if (errorMsg.contains("登录") || errorMsg.contains("会员") || errorMsg.contains("权限")) {
   530→                    return@withContext Result.failure(
   531→                        Exception("❌ 需要登录或会员权限\n\n错误信息: $errorMsg\n\n解决方案：\n• 在设置中配置B站Cookie（SESSDATA）\n• 或使用「导入本地视频」功能")
   532→                    )
   533→                }
   534→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API错误: $errorMsg"))
   535→            }
   536→
   537→            val data = infoJson.getJSONObject("data")
   538→            val cid = data.optLong("cid")
   539→            val title = data.optString("title")
   540→            val cover = data.optString("pic").replace("\\/\\\\/", "/")
   541→            val duration = data.optInt("duration")
   542→            val author = data.optJSONObject("owner")?.optString("name") ?: "未知UP主"
   543→
   544→            Log.d(TAG, "Video info: $title, cid=$cid")
   545→
   546→            // 3. 获取播放URL - 优先使用DASH格式（支持ffmpeg合并音视频）
   547→            val playUrl = "https://api.bilibili.com/x/player/playurl?bvid=$bvid&cid=$cid&qn=80&fnval=16&fnver=0&fourk=1"
   548→            val playRequestBuilder = Request.Builder()
   549→                .url(playUrl)
   550→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   551→                .header("Referer", "https://www.bilibili.com/")
   552→
   553→            if (cookie != null) {
   554→                playRequestBuilder.header("Cookie", cookie)
   555→            }
   556→
   557→            val playRequest = playRequestBuilder.build()
   558→            val playResponse = client.newCall(playRequest).execute()
   559→            val playBody = playResponse.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   560→            val playJson = JSONObject(playBody)
   561→
   562→            if (playJson.optInt("code", -1) != 0) {
   563→                val errorMsg = playJson.optString("message")
   564→                if (errorMsg.contains("登录") || errorMsg.contains("会员") || errorMsg.contains("权限")) {
   565→                    return@withContext Result.failure(
   566→                        Exception("❌ 需要登录或会员权限\n\n错误信息: $errorMsg\n\n解决方案：\n• 在设置中配置B站Cookie（SESSDATA）\n• 或使用「导入本地视频」功能")
   567→                    )
   568→                }
   569→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("获取播放URL失败: $errorMsg"))
   570→            }
   571→
   572→            val playData = playJson.getJSONObject("data")
   573→            val dash = playData.optJSONObject("dash")
   574→            val durl = playData.optJSONArray("durl")
   575→
   576→            var videoUrl: String? = null
   577→            var audioUrl: String? = null
   578→
   579→            if (durl != null && durl.length() > 0) {
   580→                // MP4格式（包含音视频）
   581→                videoUrl = durl.getJSONObject(0).optString("url")
   582→            } else if (dash != null) {
   583→                // DASH格式 - 需要分别下载音频和视频
   584→                val dashVideo = dash.optJSONArray("video")
   585→                val dashAudio = dash.optJSONArray("audio")
   586→
   587→                if (dashVideo != null && dashVideo.length() > 0) {
   588→                    videoUrl = dashVideo.getJSONObject(0).optString("baseUrl")
   589→                    // 尝试选择最佳音频质量
   590→                    if (dashAudio != null && dashAudio.length() > 0) {
   591→                        audioUrl = dashAudio.getJSONObject(0).optString("baseUrl")
   592→                    }
   593→                    Log.d(TAG, "DASH format detected: video and audio will be merged")
   594→                }
   595→            }
   596→
   597→            if (videoUrl != null) {
   598→                Log.d(TAG, "Got video URL from official API, cookies used: ${cookie != null}, hasAudio: ${audioUrl != null}")
   599→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   600→                    title = title,
   601→                    downloadUrl = videoUrl,
   602→                    cover = cover,
   603→                    duration = duration.toLong(),
   604→                    author = author,
   605→                    cookies = cookie,
   606→                    platform = VideoPlatform.BILIBILI,
   607→                    audioUrl = audioUrl
   608→                ))
   609→            }
   610→
   611→            Result.failure(Exception("无法获取播放地址"))
   612→
   613→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   614→            Log.e(TAG, "Official API error", e)
   615→            Result.failure(e)
   616→        }
   617→    }
   618→
   619→    /**
   620→     * 使用第三方API解析（备用方案）
   621→     */
   622→    private suspend fun fetchBilibiliThirdPartyAPI(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
   623→        Log.d(TAG, "Fetching Bilibili info for: $url")
   624→
   625→        // 尝试多个API（按优先级排序）
   626→        val apis = listOf(
   627→            // API 1: xboba (稳定)
   628→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.xboba.com/bilibili/video/download?url=$url", "xboba"),
   629→            // API 2: 805t (备用)
   630→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.805t.cn/bilibili/api?url=$url", "805t"),
   631→            // API 3: y1les (备用)
   632→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.y1les.cn/api/bilibili?url=$url", "y1les"),
   633→            // API 4: xingzhige (备用)
   634→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.xingzhige.com/API/BiliBili/downUrl?url=$url", "xingzhige"),
   635→            // API 5: jiuling (备用)
   636→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.jiuling.xyz/bili/video?url=$url", "jiuling"),
   637→            // API 6: iktota (新增)
   638→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.iktota.com/api/bilibili?url=$url", "iktota"),
   639→            // API 7: yange (新增)
   640→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.yange.eu.org/bilibili/api?url=$url", "yange"),
   641→            // API 8: injahou (新增)
   642→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.injahou.cn/bilibili/api?url=$url", "injahou"),
   643→            // API 9: mnium (新增)
   644→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.mnium.cn/bilibili/video?url=$url", "mnium")
   645→        )
   646→
   647→        for ((index, api) in apis.withIndex()) {
   648→            try {
   649→                Log.d(TAG, "[${index + 1}/${apis.size}] Trying Bilibili API: ${api.name}")
   650→
   651→                val result = fetchBilibiliInfoWithApi(api)
   652→                if (result.isSuccess) {
   653→                    Log.d(TAG, "Successfully fetched info using: ${api.name}")
   654→                    return result
   655→                }
   656→
   657→                Log.w(TAG, "API ${api.name} failed: ${result.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   658→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   659→                Log.e(TAG, "API ${api.name} threw exception", e)
   660→            }
   661→        }
   662→
   663→        // 所有 API 都失败，返回详细错误信息
   664→        return Result.failure(
   665→            Exception(
   666→                "❌ B站解析失败\n\n已尝试 ${apis.size} 个 API 均不可用\n\n可能的原因：\n• API 服务维护中或限流\n• 视频有地区限制\n• 会员专享内容\n• 视频已删除\n• 网络连接问题\n\n建议：\n• 稍后重试\n• 使用「导入本地视频」功能\n• 在电脑上使用 yt-dlp 下载"
   667→            )
   668→        )
   669→    }
   670→
   671→    /**
   672→     * 使用指定 API 获取 B站视频信息
   673→     */
   674→    private suspend fun fetchBilibiliInfoWithApi(api: BilibiliApiConfig): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   675→        try {
   676→            val request = Request.Builder()
   677→                .url(api.endpoint)
   678→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   679→                .header("Referer", "https://www.bilibili.com/")
   680→                .build()
   681→
   682→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   683→            val responseBody = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   684→
   685→            Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Response: ${responseBody.take(300)}")
   686→
   687→            // 检查是否是HTML响应（API可能失效）
   688→            if (responseBody.trim().startsWith("<!DOCTYPE") || responseBody.trim().startsWith("<html")) {
   689→                Log.w(TAG, "[${api.name}] API returned HTML, may be invalid")
   690→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回HTML，可能已失效"))
   691→            }
   692→
   693→            val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
   694→
   695→            // 尝试多种返回格式解析
   696→
   697→            // 格式1: {data: {url: "...", title: "..."}}
   698→            if (json.has("data")) {
   699→                val data = json.getJSONObject("data")
   700→                val videoUrl = data.optJSONArray("url")?.optString(0)
   701→                    ?: data.optString("url")
   702→                    ?: data.optString("video_url")
   703→                    ?: data.optString("playurl")
   704→                    ?: data.optString("download_url")
   705→
   706→                val title = data.optString("title")
   707→                    ?: data.optString("name")
   708→                    ?: "B站视频"
   709→
   710→                if (videoUrl.isNotEmpty() && videoUrl.startsWith("http")) {
   711→                    Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Got video URL: $videoUrl")
   712→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   713→                        title = title,
   714→                        downloadUrl = videoUrl,
   715→                        cover = data.optString("pic")
   716→                            ?: data.optString("cover")
   717→                            ?: data.optString("img"),
   718→                        duration = data.optLong("duration", 0L) / 1000,
   719→                        author = data.optString("author")
   720→                            ?: data.optString("uploader")
   721→                            ?: data.optString("owner")?.let { ownerJson ->
   722→                                try { JSONObject(ownerJson).optString("name") } catch(e: Exception) { null }
   723→                            }
   724→                    ))
   725→                }
   726→            }
   727→
   728→            // 格式2: {url: "...", title: "..."}
   729→            val directUrl = json.optString("url")
   730→                ?: json.optString("video_url")
   731→                ?: json.optString("playurl")
   732→                ?: json.optString("download_url")
   733→
   734→            if (directUrl.startsWith("http")) {
   735→                val title = json.optString("title") ?: "B站视频"
   736→                Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Got direct URL: $directUrl")
   737→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   738→                    title = title,
   739→                    downloadUrl = directUrl,
   740→                    cover = json.optString("pic") ?: json.optString("cover"),
   741→                    duration = json.optLong("duration", 0L) / 1000,
   742→                    author = json.optString("author")
   743→                ))
   744→            }
   745→
   746→            // 格式3: {code: 200, data: {url: "..."}} 或 {code: 200, url: "..."}
   747→            if (json.optInt("code") == 200 || json.optInt("code") == 1) {
   748→                val nestedData = json.optJSONObject("data")
   749→                val videoUrl = nestedData?.optString("url")
   750→                    ?: nestedData?.optString("video_url")
   751→                    ?: json.optString("url")
   752→                    ?: json.optString("video_url")
   753→
   754→                if (videoUrl?.startsWith("http") == true) {
   755→                    val title = nestedData?.optString("title")
   756→                        ?: json.optString("title")
   757→                        ?: "B站视频"
   758→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   759→                        title = title,
   760→                        downloadUrl = videoUrl,
   761→                        cover = nestedData?.optString("pic") ?: json.optString("pic"),
   762→                        duration = nestedData?.optLong("duration", 0L)?.div(1000) ?: 0L
   763→                    ))
   764→                }
   765→            }
   766→
   767→            // 格式4: {msg: "...", code: ...} - 可能包含错误信息
   768→            val msg = json.optString("msg") ?: json.optString("message")
   769→            if (msg.isNotEmpty()) {
   770→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回: $msg"))
   771→            }
   772→
   773→            // 无法解析
   774→            return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法解析API响应格式"))
   775→
   776→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   777→            Log.e(TAG, "[${api.name}] Request failed", e)
   778→            Result.failure(e)
   779→        }
   780→    }
   781→
   782→    /**
   783→     * 获取抖音视频信息 - 改进版，支持多种 API 和重试机制
   784→     * 参考 Electron 版本的浏览器内核解析方式
   785→     * 改进：增加更多备用 API，改进解析逻辑
   786→     */
   787→    private suspend fun fetchDouyinInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
   788→        Log.d(TAG, "Fetching Douyin info for: $url")
   789→
   790→        // 尝试多个API（按优先级排序）- 基于GitHub研究添加更多备用
   791→        val apis = listOf(
   792→            // API 1: pearktrue (稳定)
   793→            DouyinApiConfig("https://api.pearktrue.com/api/v1/parse/douyin?url=$url", "pearktrue"),
   794→            // API 2: vdzx (备用)
   795→            DouyinApiConfig("https://api.vdzx.com/api/douyin?url=$url", "vdzx"),
   796→            // API 3: xboba (备用)
   797→            DouyinApiConfig("https://api.xboba.com/douyin/video/download?url=$url", "xboba"),
   798→            // API 4: 805t (新增)
   799→            DouyinApiConfig("https://api.805t.cn/douyin/api?url=$url", "805t"),
   800→            // API 5: y1les (新增)
   801→            DouyinApiConfig("https://api.y1les.cn/api/douyin?url=$url", "y1les"),
   802→            // API 6: iktota (新增)
   803→            DouyinApiConfig("https://api.iktota.com/api/douyin?url=$url", "iktota")
   804→        )
   805→
   806→        for ((index, api) in apis.withIndex()) {
   807→            try {
   808→                Log.d(TAG, "[${index + 1}/${apis.size}] Trying Douyin API: ${api.name}")
   809→
   810→                val result = fetchDouyinInfoWithApi(api)
   811→                if (result.isSuccess) {
   812→                    Log.d(TAG, "Successfully fetched info using: ${api.name}")
   813→                    return result
   814→                }
   815→
   816→                Log.w(TAG, "API ${api.name} failed: ${result.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   817→
   818→                // 如果不是最后一个API，延迟后重试
   819→                if (index < apis.size - 1) {
   820→                    delay(RETRY_DELAY_MS)
   821→                }
   822→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   823→                Log.e(TAG, "API ${api.name} threw exception", e)
   824→                if (index < apis.size - 1) {
   825→                    delay(RETRY_DELAY_MS)
   826→                }
   827→            }
   828→        }
   829→
   830→        // 所有 API 都失败
   831→        return Result.failure(
   832→            Exception(
   833→                "❌ 抖音解析失败\n\n已尝试 ${apis.size} 个 API 均不可用\n\n可能的原因：\n• 视频是私密内容\n• 视频已删除\n• API 服务限流\n• 链接格式错误\n\n建议：\n• 确认视频链接有效\n• 使用「导入本地视频」功能"
   834→            )
   835→        )
   836→    }
   837→
   838→    /**
   839→     * 使用指定 API 获取抖音视频信息
   840→     */
   841→    private suspend fun fetchDouyinInfoWithApi(api: DouyinApiConfig): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   842→        try {
   843→            val request = Request.Builder()
   844→                .url(api.endpoint)
   845→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   846→                .header("Referer", "https://www.douyin.com/")
   847→                .build()
   848→
   849→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   850→            val responseBody = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   851→
   852→            Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Response: ${responseBody.take(300)}")
   853→
   854→            // 检查是否是HTML
   855→            if (responseBody.trim().startsWith("<!DOCTYPE") || responseBody.trim().startsWith("<html")) {
   856→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回HTML，可能已失效"))
   857→            }
   858→
   859→            val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
   860→
   861→            // 检查响应状态码
   862→            val code = json.optInt("code")
   863→            if (code != 200 && code != 1 && code != 0) {
   864→                val msg = json.optString("msg") ?: json.optString("message") ?: "未知错误"
   865→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回错误($code): $msg"))
   866→            }
   867→
   868→            // 解析视频数据 - 支持多种格式
   869→            // 格式1: {code: 200, data: {video: [{play_addr: "..."}], desc: "..."}}
   870→            if (json.has("data")) {
   871→                val data = json.getJSONObject("data")
   872→
   873→                // 尝试获取视频 URL
   874→                val videoData = data.optJSONArray("video")?.optJSONObject(0)
   875→                    ?: data.optJSONArray("data")?.optJSONObject(0)
   876→                    ?: data
   877→
   878→                val videoUrl = videoData.optString("play_addr")
   879→                    ?: videoData.optString("play_addr_https")
   880→                    ?: videoData.optString("url")
   881→                    ?: videoData.optString("video_url")
   882→                    ?: videoData.optString("download_addr")
   883→
   884→                val title = data.optString("desc")
   885→                    ?: data.optString("title")
   886→                    ?: data.optString("text")
   887→                    ?: "抖音视频"
   888→
   889→                if (videoUrl.isNotEmpty() && (videoUrl.startsWith("http") || videoUrl.startsWith("//"))) {
   890→                    // 处理相对协议 URL
   891→                    val finalUrl = if (videoUrl.startsWith("//")) "https:$videoUrl" else videoUrl
   892→
   893→                    // 提取作者信息
   894→                    val author = data.optJSONObject("author")?.optString("nickname")
   895→                        ?: data.optString("author")
   896→                        ?: data.optString("nickname")
   897→
   898→                    val cover = data.optString("cover")
   899→                        ?: data.optString("thumb")
   900→                        ?: data.optString("origin_cover")
   901→                        ?: data.optString("dynamic_cover")
   902→                        ?: videoData.optString("cover")
   903→
   904→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   905→                        title = title,
   906→                        downloadUrl = finalUrl,
   907→                        cover = cover,
   908→                        duration = videoData.optLong("duration", 0L),
   909→                        author = author
   910→                    ))
   911→                }
   912→            }
   913→
   914→            // 格式2: {url: "...", title: "...", author: "..."}
   915→            val directUrl = json.optString("url")
   916→                ?: json.optString("play_addr")
   917→                ?: json.optString("video_url")
   918→
   919→            if (directUrl.startsWith("http") || directUrl.startsWith("//")) {
   920→                val finalUrl = if (directUrl.startsWith("//")) "https:$directUrl" else directUrl
   921→                val title = json.optString("title")
   922→                    ?: json.optString("desc")
   923→                    ?: json.optString("text")
   924→                    ?: "抖音视频"
   925→
   926→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   927→                    title = title,
   928→                    downloadUrl = finalUrl,
   929→                    cover = json.optString("cover") ?: json.optString("thumb"),
   930→                    duration = json.optLong("duration", 0L),
   931→                    author = json.optString("author") ?: json.optString("nickname")
   932→                ))
   933→            }
   934→
   935→            // 无法获取视频链接
   936→            return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法从API响应中提取视频链接"))
   937→
   938→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   939→            Log.e(TAG, "[${api.name}] Request failed", e)
   940→            Result.failure(e)
   941→        }
   942→    }
   943→
   944→    /**
   945→     * 获取 TikTok 视频信息 - 改进版
   946→     * TikTok 和抖音解析逻辑相似，尝试多个 API
   947→     */
   948→    private suspend fun fetchTiktokInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
   949→        Log.d(TAG, "Fetching TikTok info for: $url")
   950→
   951→        // TikTok 可以使用与抖音类似的 API
   952→        val apis = listOf(
   953→            // API 1: tikwm (专门用于 TikTok)
   954→            TiktokApiConfig("https://www.tikwm.com/api/?url=$url", "tikwm"),
   955→            // API 2: 通用 API
   956→            TiktokApiConfig("https://api.pearktrue.com/api/v1/parse/tiktok?url=$url", "pearktrue"),
   957→            // API 3: other API
   958→            TiktokApiConfig("https://api.xboba.com/tiktok/video/download?url=$url", "xboba")
   959→        )
   960→
   961→        for ((index, api) in apis.withIndex()) {
   962→            try {
   963→                Log.d(TAG, "[${index + 1}/${apis.size}] Trying TikTok API: ${api.name}")
   964→
   965→                val result = fetchTiktokInfoWithApi(api)
   966→                if (result.isSuccess) {
   967→                    Log.d(TAG, "Successfully fetched info using: ${api.name}")
   968→                    return result
   969→                }
   970→
   971→                Log.w(TAG, "API ${api.name} failed: ${result.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   972→
   973→                if (index < apis.size - 1) {
   974→                    delay(RETRY_DELAY_MS)
   975→                }
   976→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   977→                Log.e(TAG, "API ${api.name} threw exception", e)
   978→                if (index < apis.size - 1) {
   979→                    delay(RETRY_DELAY_MS)
   980→                }
   981→            }
   982→        }
   983→
   984→        return Result.failure(
   985→            Exception(
   986→                "❌ TikTok 解析失败\n\n已尝试 ${apis.size} 个 API 均不可用\n\n可能的原因：\n• 视频是私密内容\n• 视频已删除\n• 地区限制\n• API 服务限流\n\n建议：\n• 使用「导入本地视频」功能"
   987→            )
   988→        )
   989→    }
   990→
   991→    /**
   992→     * 使用指定 API 获取 TikTok 视频信息
   993→     */
   994→    private suspend fun fetchTiktokInfoWithApi(api: TiktokApiConfig): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   995→        try {
   996→            val request = Request.Builder()
   997→                .url(api.endpoint)
   998→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   999→                .header("Referer", "https://www.tiktok.com/")
  1000→                .build()
  1001→
  1002→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
  1003→            val responseBody = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
  1004→
  1005→            Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Response: ${responseBody.take(300)}")
  1006→
  1007→            if (responseBody.trim().startsWith("<!DOCTYPE") || responseBody.trim().startsWith("<html")) {
  1008→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回HTML，可能已失效"))
  1009→            }
  1010→
  1011→            val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
  1012→
  1013→            // tikwm API 格式: {code: 0, data: {title: "...", play: "...", ...}}
  1014→            if (api.name == "tikwm") {
  1015→                if (json.optInt("code") == 0 && json.has("data")) {
  1016→                    val data = json.getJSONObject("data")
  1017→                    val videoUrl = data.optString("play")
  1018→                        ?: data.optString("hdplay")
  1019→                        ?: data.optString("wmplay")
  1020→
  1021→                    if (videoUrl.startsWith("http")) {
  1022→                        return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
  1023→                            title = data.optString("title") ?: "TikTok 视频",
  1024→                            downloadUrl = videoUrl,
  1025→                            cover = data.optString("cover") ?: data.optString("origin_cover"),
  1026→                            duration = data.optLong("duration", 0L),
  1027→                            author = data.optJSONObject("author")?.optString("nickname")
  1028→                        ))
  1029→                    }
  1030→                }
  1031→            }
  1032→
  1033→            // 其他 API 通用格式
  1034→            val code = json.optInt("code")
  1035→            if (code != 200 && code != 1 && code != 0) {
  1036→                val msg = json.optString("msg") ?: json.optString("message") ?: "未知错误"
  1037→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回错误($code): $msg"))
  1038→            }
  1039→
  1040→            if (json.has("data")) {
  1041→                val data = json.getJSONObject("data")
  1042→                val videoData = data.optJSONArray("video")?.optJSONObject(0) ?: data
  1043→
  1044→                val videoUrl = videoData.optString("play_addr")
  1045→                    ?: videoData.optString("url")
  1046→                    ?: data.optString("video_url")
  1047→
  1048→                if (videoUrl.isNotEmpty() && videoUrl.startsWith("http")) {
  1049→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
  1050→                        title = data.optString("desc") ?: data.optString("title") ?: "TikTok 视频",
  1051→                        downloadUrl = videoUrl,
  1052→                        cover = data.optString("cover") ?: data.optString("thumb"),
  1053→                        duration = videoData.optLong("duration", 0L),
  1054→                        author = data.optJSONObject("author")?.optString("nickname")
  1055→                    ))
  1056→                }
  1057→            }
  1058→
  1059→            // 直接格式
  1060→            val directUrl = json.optString("url") ?: json.optString("video_url")
  1061→            if (directUrl.startsWith("http")) {
  1062→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
  1063→                    title = json.optString("title") ?: "TikTok 视频",
  1064→                    downloadUrl = directUrl,
  1065→                    cover = json.optString("cover"),
  1066→                    duration = json.optLong("duration", 0L)
  1067→                ))
  1068→            }
  1069→
  1070→            return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法从API响应中提取视频链接"))
  1071→
  1072→        } catch (e: Exception) {
  1073→            Log.e(TAG, "[${api.name}] Request failed", e)
  1074→            Result.failure(e)
  1075→        }
  1076→    }
  1077→
  1078→    /**
  1079→     * 获取标准 User-Agent
  1080→     * 参考 Electron 版本使用真实的浏览器 UA
  1081→     */
  1082→    private fun getUserAgent(): String {
  1083→        return "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 " +
  1084→               "(KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"
  1085→    }
  1086→
  1087→    // ==================== API 配置数据类 ====================
  1088→
  1089→    private data class YoutubeApiConfig(
  1090→        val endpoint: String,
  1091→        val name: String
  1092→    )
  1093→
  1094→    private data class BilibiliApiConfig(
  1095→        val endpoint: String,
  1096→        val name: String
  1097→    )
  1098→
  1099→    private data class DouyinApiConfig(
  1100→        val endpoint: String,
  1101→        val name: String
  1102→    )
  1103→
  1104→    private data class TiktokApiConfig(
  1105→        val endpoint: String,
  1106→        val name: String
  1107→    )
  1108→
  1109→    /**
  1110→     * 下载数据类
  1111→     */
  1112→    data class VideoDownloadInfo(
  1113→        val title: String,
  1114→        val downloadUrl: String,
  1115→        val cover: String? = null,
  1116→        val duration: Long = 0,
  1117→        val author: String? = null,
  1118→        val cookies: String? = null, // 下载时需要的Cookie
  1119→        val platform: VideoPlatform = VideoPlatform.UNKNOWN,
  1120→        val audioUrl: String? = null // DASH格式的音频流URL
  1121→    )
  1122→
  1123→    /**
  1124→     * 支持的平台
  1125→     */
  1126→    enum class VideoPlatform {
  1127→        BILIBILI, DOUYIN, TIKTOK, YOUTUBE, WEIBO, XIAOHONGSHU, DIRECT, UNKNOWN
  1128→    }
  1129→}
  1130→
